The Field
Guide.

Ghost Town Ranch is a lifestyle brand for the modern pioneer — rooted in the wide light and open spaces of the American West, and carried by anyone who lives with that same clarity. A disposition, not a zip code.

The ranch is real. A restored mid-century home on five parcels at the foothills of Joshua Tree National Park — where the West is still unfinished and the land holds its history plainly.

The line spans home fragrance, skin, hair, and makeup-meets-skincare — each product rooted in the same material honesty as the landscape that inspired it.

COSMOS/ECOCERT Vegan Cruelty-Free Phthalate-Free

No. 01
Ritual · Candles + Scent

Ritual.
Scent as landscape.

Scent Guide
Six Landscapes

The land has a scent.
Six ways to carry it.

No. 01
Rough Hewn
Cade · Cedarwood

The smell of something being made. Raw wood, dry earth, a day of real work.

No. 02
Hang Dried
White Sage · Lavender

The room after the window has been open all morning. Cool and unencumbered.

No. 03
Ember
Charcoal · Amber

The last hour of a good night. Deep smoke, warm amber, the canyon after rain.

No. 04
Graze
Sweetgrass · Sage

High desert morning. River-clean and sharp. The good scrub after a long ride.

No. 05
Flax
Cotton Blossom · Citron

Warm stone, prairie grass. Lemon, cotton blossom, blonde woods in late afternoon.

No. 06
Dusk
Palo Santo · Amber

Dry earth, warm amber, ancient and mineral. The day ending on its own terms.

The Monument · 55oz · 4-Wick

Ghost Town Ranch · Frontier Modernism

The desert does not ask you
to be comfortable.
It asks you to be honest.

Terms
Wholesale

Ordering +
terms.

Pricing

All retail pricing at ghosttownranch.com. Wholesale follows strict 50% keystone. Current pricing on request.

Minimum Order

Opening order minimum: $350 wholesale. Reorder minimum: $150 wholesale.

Payment

Net 30 for established accounts. New accounts: payment at time of order. All major cards + ACH accepted.

Lead Time

Standard 2–3 weeks from order confirmation. Rush available — contact us.

Shipping

Calculated at checkout or invoiced separately. FOB Palm Springs, CA.

Certifications

COSMOS/ECOCERT certified. Vegan. Cruelty-free. Phthalate-free. Full ingredient lists at ghosttownranch.com.

Ghost Town Ranch.
From the wide open,
for every day.

To save this catalog as a PDF:

  1. Click Print Catalog below
  2. In the print dialog, set Destination to Save as PDF
  3. Set Margins to None
  4. Enable Background graphics
  5. Click Save

Works best in Chrome or Edge. Letter or A4 size.
